pages.image_tooltip: An ancient armored reptile with a sharp pair of spikes protruding from its back, Desmatosuchus is actually quite shy, opting to dig itself into the ground and wallow in the mud instead.

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Desmatosuchus loves wallowing in §aMud§7, §aMoss§7, and §aSnow§7 and get dirty—or can be made dirty by using Mud, Snow, or Moss on it
pages.feature_1.title: Unbothered.
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Muddy Desmatosuchus can be cleaned with water, and may also get washed in the rain or in water
pages.feature_2.title: Moisturized.
pages.feature_3.tooltip: Snowy and Muddy Desmatosuchus can be cleaned with a shovel and drops §aSnowballs§7 or §aMud§7 respectively
pages.feature_3.title: Happy, In My Lane.

pages.feature_1.tooltip: Mossy Desmatosuchus be sheared and drops §aMoss§7
pages.feature_1.title: Focused.
pages.feature_2.tooltip: Desmatosuchus can bury itself in certain blocks
pages.feature_2.title: Flourishing.
